rationale.R1.5: The agent provided a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear per-section rationale, improving the structure significantly.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was disclosed for specific claims but not consistently across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output adheres exactly to the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions and identified harmful patterns, ensuring downstream harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked annotations.
